name: Deck Studio
description: Build a native, editable PowerPoint deck — real text, bullets, tables and brand theme — from a simple slide builder, pasted Markdown, or a JSON spec. Charts and diagrams come from your other Lolly tools. Exports .pptx (editable), plus PDF and PNG.

deck.heading: Make the easy path the on-brand path
deck.subtitle: Design ops

inputs.label: Deck size
inputs.help: One size for the whole deck — PowerPoint gives every slide the same size.

inputs.label: Slide numbers
inputs.help: Show a small slide number in the corner of every slide.

inputs.label: Brand logo
inputs.help: Place the active brand's logo on each slide — automatically the light or dark version to suit the slide's background. Override per slide in the builder.

inputs.label: Paste a deck — Markdown or JSON
inputs.placeholder:
# Title slide
## Subtitle

---

## Bullets
- point one
- point two

---

## A table
| Name | Value |
| --- | --- |
| A | 1 |
inputs.help: Paste a whole deck as **Markdown** (`---` or headings split slides; pipe tables and `![](url)` images render natively) or as **JSON** (a `slides` array of `{ layout, title, subtitle, body, table, image, notes }`). When filled it drives the whole deck and the builder below is ignored. Leave it blank to use the builder.

inputs.label: Slides
inputs.help: Each block is one slide. Pick a layout when you add it. Paste Markdown to fill it fast (one slide per heading), or import a CSV/JSON.

fields.label: Body
fields.placeholder: One line per bullet. Indent with two spaces for a sub-bullet. **bold**, *italic*, __underline__.

fields.label: Visual — a Lolly tool link or image
fields.help: Paste a Lolly tool link (a D3 chart, Flow Chart, Chart Creator, map…) or pick an image. It renders straight into the slide.

fields.label: Table data
fields.placeholder: CSV or a Markdown pipe table. First row is the header.

fields.label: Logo on this slide
fields.help: Overrides the deck's brand-logo setting for this one slide.

fields.label: Speaker notes
fields.placeholder: Presenter notes — travel into PowerPoint's notes pane, never shown on the slide.

default.heading: Deck Studio
default.subtitle: Native PowerPoint, on brand
default.notes: Open with why the deck exists.

default.heading: One model, many ways in
default.body:
Type in the builder
Paste **Markdown** — one slide per heading
  each bullet becomes editable text
Or paste a JSON spec
default.notes: Every entry mode lands in the same deck.

default.heading: Native editable tables
default.notes: This is a real PowerPoint table — click to edit.

default.heading: Charts from your tools
default.body:
Drop a **D3** or **Flow Chart** link into the visual slot
It renders as a crisp vector
No chart engine to learn
default.notes: Compose any Lolly tool as a slide visual.
